title: Ts@dad #6657
definition:
Zedad = "mountain side"

 1) one of the landmarks on the northern border of Israel as promised
    by Moses and restated by Ezekiel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zedad = "mountain side"

 1) one of the landmarks on the northern border of Israel as promised
    by Moses and restated by Ezekiel

    NASB:  a place on the N. border of Canaan
